title: Hotel der toten Gäste
writer: Hannes-Karl Kubiak, Michael Dreesen, Max Rottmann
actors: Joachim Fuchsberger, Karin Dor, Frank Latimore
plot: Hotel detective Janos Kovacs travels from San Remo, where the Schlagerfestival will soon be held, to London. He wants to sell critical information to the crime reporter Barney Blair. Before Barney arrives, Kovacs is stabbed.
